data.title: Hello, world from Django
data.excerpt: A blog post stored as a JSON file in @webhouse/cms and rendered by a Django view.
data.content:
## The setup

This post lives at `content/posts/hello-world.json`. It's a flat JSON file in the @webhouse/cms format. **Django reads it directly** via the `blog.webhouse` module — no API calls, no database, just `Path.glob()` and `json.loads()`.

## Why this matters

The content is in your git repository. The schema is in `cms.config.ts`. The renderer is your Django app. There's no vendor lock-in.

## What you can edit

Open CMS admin and point it at this folder. Edit the title above. Save. Reload this page. The change is live.
data.author: Christian Broberg
